name: FOUR PLAY
subtitle: Quad Voltage-Controlled Amplifier
summary: Quad VCA based on Mutable Instruments Quad VCA. Each of four channels has a LEVEL knob, CV attenuator, gain BOOST switch, and EXP/LIN curve selection. CV inputs normalise from the channel above for one-cable control of all four. A MIX output sums all channels for voltage-controlled mixing.
